theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

top_news.title: Strong U.S. Jobs Report Lowers Recession Risks Despite Wage Growth Lagging Inflation
top_news.summary: Gene Sperling, President of Sperling Economic Strategies and former director of the National Economic Council, discussed the recent U.S. jobs report, highlighting that the headline numbers were stronger than expected and suggest a low likelihood of recession despite ongoing geopolitical and economic challenges. He noted that while job creation appears broad-based, some gains—such as the 70,000 hospitality jobs—may be influenced by seasonal factors like World Cup-related hiring. He sp

top_news.title: Marvell Technology, Flex to Join S&P 500 Later This Month
top_news.summary: Marvell Technology Inc. and Flex Ltd. will join the S&P 500 in the latest quarterly rebalance, S&P Dow Jones Indices said Friday.

top_news.title: Tech Selloff, Bitcoin Drop Test Retail Investor Strength Ahead of SpaceX IPO
top_news.summary: For years, Wall Street has benefited from one of the most reliable forces in modern markets: a retail-trader army willing to buy almost anything.

top_news.title: Canada’s TerraVest Slides as Warrant Alleges Insider Tipping
top_news.summary: Shares of Canadian manufacturer TerraVest Industries Inc. closed down the most since 2011 over allegations of insider tipping by its executive chairman.

top_news.title: Beating the S&P For Generations: Masters in Business with Chris Davis
top_news.summary: Barry sits down with Chris Davis,  Chairman and Portfolio Manager at Davis Funds. They discuss his approach to managing risk and the key elements changing the economy. Chris and Barry also discuss Chris's mentors including Charlie Munger, and how he settled into the family business. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Dollar Gains as Resilient Job Market Boosts Fed Hike Bets
top_news.summary: The dollar posted its best day in more than two months on Friday as traders priced in higher interest rates after new data revealed a stronger labor market than expected.

top_news.title: Emerging-Market Currencies Plunge on Blowout US Jobs Report
top_news.summary: Currencies in the developing world sank after a blowout US jobs report provided the clearest sign yet that the labor market is breaking out of a prolonged period of lackluster hiring, undercutting the case for rate cuts from the Federal Reserve.

top_news.title: JPMorgan Turns Rosy on Tesla a Day After Dimon Lauds Musk
top_news.summary: The morning after Jamie Dimon offered Elon Musk an audience to talk up SpaceX, JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s new lead autos analyst completely changed the bank’s tune on Tesla Inc.

top_news.title: Earnings and AI-Driven CapEx as Key to Sustained Gains
top_news.summary:
Katherine Bordlethwait, Goldman Sachs asset management co head of equity client portfolio management, discussed the current equity market environment amid record highs and strong investor enthusiasm. She emphasized that continued earnings growth is critical for the market to sustain its momentum, noting that corporate profits as a percentage of GDP are at a record high.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Private Credit Deterioration Slow, Contained: Robson
top_news.summary: Meghan Robson, head of US credit strategy at BNP Paribas, and Sonali Pier, portfolio manager: multi-sector credit at PIMCO, join Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Cliffwater, Blackstone, and Partners Group all capped certain fund redemptions this week. The moves put private markets back into the spotlight. (Source: Bloomberg)
